title: Open the app and verify the main content area
preconditions: The app is installed and opened
test_steps: Open the app | Verify the main content area displays a large image of a dog with multiple text overlays
expected_result: The main content area displays a large image of a dog with multiple text overlays

title: Click on the share icon in the header
preconditions: The app is installed and opened
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the share icon in the header | Verify the share options are displayed

title: Click on the delete icon in the header
preconditions: The app is installed and opened
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the delete icon in the header | Verify the delete confirmation dialog is displayed

title: Click on the more options icon in the header
preconditions: The app is installed and opened
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the more options icon in the header | Verify the more options menu is displayed

title: Input text into one of the text overlays
preconditions: The app is installed and opened
test_steps: Open the app | Click on one of the text overlays | Input 'Test text' into the text overlay | Verify the text overlay displays 'Test text'

title: Select a different text overlay color
preconditions: The app is installed and opened
test_steps: Open the app | Click on one of the text overlays | Select a different text overlay color | Verify the selected color is applied to the text overlay
expected_result: The selected color is applied to the text overlay

title: Navigate back to the previous screen
preconditions: The app is installed and opened
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate back to the previous screen | Verify the previous screen is displayed
